fields.aboutBodyOne: founder of nc studio. inspired by film and drawn to genuine moments, i document weddings with a timeless and cinematic approach.
fields.aboutBodyTwo: my goal is simple: to preserve your day in a way that feels honest, beautiful and true to you.
fields.aboutBodyThree: because long after the flowers fade and the music stops, the memories remain. and they deserve to be remembered well.
fields.principleOneText: your day is captured with feeling, not just as a checklist of moments.
fields.principleTwoText: gentle guidance when needed, with space for natural moments to unfold.
fields.principleThreeText: clean colours, soft movement and a timeless edit that feels true to the day.
fields.workLead: wedding photography, cinematic films and story led content.
